name: Vienna (Austria)

colors.symbolism: the historic Babenberg colours of Austria
the historic Babenberg colours of Austria

description: A horizontal bicolour of red over white, the same colours as the Austrian national flag.
history: Vienna's red-and-white bicolour traces back to the medieval banner of the Babenberg margraves; current form regulated by the City of Vienna. Vienna is one of Austria's nine federal states (Bundeslaender) as well as the country's capital and largest city.

features.symbolism: the historic Babenberg colours of Austria, identical to the Austrian national flag
